zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Ainsworth於1652年出生在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比時，他的父親John Ainsworth27歲，母親Alice Elizabeth Smith28歲。他於1687年1月11日與Joanna Hemenway在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1740年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Ainsworth于1652年出生在英国林可爾史爾維洛賀比时，他的父亲John Ainsworth27岁，母亲Alice Elizabeth Smith28岁。他于1687年1月11日与Joanna Hemenway在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1740年3月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ainsworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Manchester named Ainsworth, from the Old English personal name Ægen + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
English (Yorkshire): in Yorkshire the name was a variant of, or confused with   Hainsworth  .

variants.name: Hainsworth
meanings: (Yorkshire): habitational name from Hainworth in Keighley, Yorkshire, named from the Old English personal name Hagena + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. The intrusive -s- was acquired by the late 15th century, probably through false association with the Lancashire surname Ainsworth in 2 below.
variant of Ainsworth in Lancashire. Names such as de Haynesworth and de Heynesworth occur in the surrounding area in the 14th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Ainsworth was born in 1652, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Ainsworth, was 27 and his mother, Alice Elizabeth Smith, was 28. He married Joanna Hemenway on 11 January 1687, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 5 March 1740, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 88.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Ainsworth è nato il nel 1652 nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Ainsworth, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Elizabeth Smith, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Hemenway il 11 gennaio 1687, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 5 marzo 1740, nel Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Ainsworthが1652年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーで生まれた時，父John Ainsworthは27歳，母Alice Elizabeth Smithは28歳であった。1687年1月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーでJoanna Hemenwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1740年3月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで88歳で死去した。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Ainsworth(이)가 1652년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ainsworth(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Elizabeth Smith(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1687년 1월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joanna Hemenway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1740년 3월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Ainsworth nasceu em 1652, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Ainsworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Elizabeth Smith, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Hemenway em 11 de janeiro de 1687, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1740, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Ainsworth родился в 1652 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ainsworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Elizabeth Smith, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Hemenway 11 января 1687 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 5 марта 1740 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Ainsworth nació en 1652, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Ainsworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice Elizabeth Smith, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joanna Hemenway el 11 de enero de 1687, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 5 de marzo de 1740, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 88 años.
